ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly readable. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce/ICC.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 15 pages, clearly readable. Issued by SKF Eurotrade AB.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header 'SKF Eurotrade AB' and 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'
Invoice pages 2-15: repeated in header and footer on every page

rule_activation.lc_verification_note: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-426474' does not contain an LC banking term reference.

pairing_validation.note: Certificate references invoice 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025. Invoice file contains invoice number 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025. Consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer. Consignee Proxima LLC matches Bill to/Sold to on invoice.

checkpoint_results.invoice_value: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden (Issued by)

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: SKF Eurotrade AB is explicitly identified as the invoice issuer in the header and 'Issued by' block on every page of the invoice.
Company name: 'SKF Eurotrade AB' in certificate matches 'SKF Eurotrade AB' in invoice exactly. Country: 'Sweden' in certificate matches 'Sweden' in invoice Issued by block.
Sweden confirmed via explicit address 'Sweden' in Issued by block, IBAN prefix SE, and phone prefix +46.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' at '415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden' matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB' at '415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'. GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg is a minor diacritical/formatting difference, not a substantive difference. Country Sweden explicitly stated in both. Direct match on company name and country.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan (Bill to / Sold to)

comparison_steps.description: Priority order – identify primary billing field
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains explicit 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' fields, both naming 'Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan'. Certificate consignee matches exactly.
'Proxima LLC' in certificate matches 'Proxima LLC' in invoice Bill to and Sold to fields exactly.
'Azerbaijan' in certificate matches 'Azerbaijan' in invoice Bill to and Sold to fields.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification – Bill to/Sold to field used

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Proxima LLC' at 'City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan' matches invoice Bill to and Sold to fields exactly: 'Proxima LLC, City Point, 2nd floor, AZ1078 Baku, Azerbaijan'. Company name, address and country all match perfectly.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: 16 CASE(S) OF: 322576852, 445445844-445445854, 445447967, 445448288, 445483605, 521225691 Bearings and components, chains, lubricators, measuring equipment For detailed description refer to the inv 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Invoice 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025 containing bearings, components, chains, lubricators, measuring equipment etc. with transport package numbers 322576852, 445445844-445445854, 445447967, 445448288, 445483605, 521225691 and 16 packages

comparison_steps.detail: Certificate uses general goods description with explicit reference to invoice 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025 ('For detailed description refer to the inv 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025'). Invoice number matches (8500026528). Invoice date matches (18.12.2025). The phrase 'For detailed description refer to the inv' constitutes an express reference to the invoice. The certificate description 'Bearings and components, chains, lubricators, measuring equipment' is consistent with the invoice contents which include ball bearings, roller bearings, sprockets, chains, lubricators, shaft seals, induction heaters, mechanic tool-set, housing etc.

comparison_steps.description: Verify collateral marks in certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate lists transport package numbers: 322576852, 445445844-445445854, 445447967, 445448288, 445483605, 521225691. Invoice page 15 lists identical transport package numbers. Certificate states '16 CASE(S)'. Invoice page 15 states 'Number of packages: 16'. Full consistency.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate references invoice explicitly with matching number and date

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate contains general goods description 'Bearings and components, chains, lubricators, measuring equipment' with explicit invoice reference 'For detailed description refer to the inv 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025'. This satisfies rule 4.3.5: invoice number 8500026528 matches, invoice date 18.12.2025 matches, and the phrase constitutes an express reference. The invoice content (various bearings, roller chains, lubricators, shaft seals, induction heaters, housing, tool-sets etc.) is fully consistent with the certificate's general description. Transport package numbers and number of cases (16) also match exactly between certificate and invoice page 15. No article numbers are specified in the certificate itself requiring Priority 1 verification.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Verify each goods item individually via Priority 2 textmatchning
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Not required because Priority 3 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens) is satisfied. Certificate does not list individual article numbers requiring Priority 1.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: GW in KGS: 2.087,860 / NETW in KGS: 1.858,748
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 2.087,860 KG / Total Net Weight 1.858,748 KG (Invoice page 15)

comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains two weight values: GW in KGS: 2.087,860 and NETW in KGS: 1.858,748. Both have explicit weight category (GW/NETW) and unit (KGS). These are the verification-grounding quantities.

Certificate GW: 2.087,860 KGS (normalized: 2087.860 KG). Invoice page 15: Total Gross Weight 2.087,860 KG (normalized: 2087.860 KG). Exact match after thousands separator normalization (rule 4.4.3.3: period as thousands separator in European notation).

Certificate NW: 1.858,748 KGS (normalized: 1858.748 KG). Invoice page 15: Total Net Weight 1.858,748 KG (normalized: 1858.748 KG). Exact match. Also confirmed by total row on page 3: 1.858,748 Net kg.

rules_applied.outcome: Applied – both GW and NW from box 7 used

rules_applied.description: Weight category explicitly stated (GW and NETW)

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH – both GW and NW match exactly
Applied – period as thousands separator, comma as decimal
MATCH – invoice page 15 Total Gross Weight and Total Net Weight match

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states GW in KGS: 2.087,860 and NETW in KGS: 1.858,748. Using European decimal notation (period = thousands separator, comma = decimal separator), these normalize to 2087.860 KG GW and 1858.748 KG NW. Invoice page 15 Transport details states Total Gross Weight 2.087,860 KG and Total Net Weight 1.858,748 KG, which normalize identically. Both weight values match exactly. Additionally, the total row on invoice page 3 confirms Net kg total as 1.858,748. Both GW and NW are verified, satisfying rule 4.4.3.1 (verify at least one, and no explicit contradiction on the other).

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Austria, Bulgaria, China, India, Poland, Czech Republic, Finland, Italy, Sweden, France, Germany, Netherlands, USA
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Country of manufacturing: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, Finland, France, Germany, India, Italy, Netherlands, Poland, Sweden, USA

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice uses 'Country of manufacturing' column on pages 1-2 and detailed line items on pages 7-14 with country codes (AT, BG, CN, CZ, FI, FR, DE, IN, IT, NL, PL, SE, US). These are explicit origin fields.

comparison_steps.description: Verify each certificate origin country against invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Austria → found in invoice (AT, pages 1, 7). Bulgaria → found (BG, pages 1, 7). China → found (CN, pages 1, 7-9). India → found (IN, pages 2, 12). Poland → found (PL, pages 2, 13). Czech Republic → found (CZ, pages 1, 9). Finland → found (FI, pages 2, 9). Italy → found (IT, pages 2, 12-13). Sweden → found (SE, pages 2, 13-14). France → found (FR, pages 2, 9-11). Germany → found (DE, pages 2, 11-12). Netherlands → found (NL, pages 2, 13). USA → found (US, pages 2, 14). All 13 countries verified.

comparison_steps.description: Check for extra countries in invoice not in certificate
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice lists exactly the same 13 countries as certificate: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, Finland, France, Germany, India, Italy, Netherlands, Poland, Sweden, USA. No additional countries present in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Verify vara-ursprungsland koppling for multiple origins
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate references invoice for detailed description ('For detailed description refer to the inv 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025'). Invoice explicitly maps each product to its country of manufacturing. This satisfies rule 4.3.7's requirement for per-item origin mapping via invoice reference.

rules_applied.description: Identify origin fields in invoice – 'Country of manufacturing' column
Koppling vara-ursprungsland – certificate references invoice for per-item details

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 lists 13 origin countries: Austria, Bulgaria, China, India, Poland, Czech Republic, Finland, Italy, Sweden, France, Germany, Netherlands, USA. Invoice 'Country of manufacturing' column and detailed line-item pages list exactly the same 13 countries (using both full names on summary pages and ISO codes AT, BG, CN, CZ, FI, FR, DE, IN, IT, NL, PL, SE, US on detail pages). Every country in the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice. No extra countries appear in the invoice. USA (certificate) = US (invoice) is a standard normalization per 4.5.4. The per-article origin mapping is handled via the certificate's invoice reference per rule 4.3.7.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate lists non-EU countries (China, India, USA) alongside EU countries – could this trigger MISMATCH under 4.5.4.1?
rejected_hypotheses.reason: No. The certificate explicitly lists all 13 countries individually in box 3, including China, India, and USA. The invoice confirms all 13 countries. There is no EU-only claim that would be contradicted by non-EU origins. All non-EU countries in the invoice are explicitly listed in the certificate's origin field. No MISMATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-426474 does not constitute an LC reference.
Certificate file contains one certificate (Original). Invoice file contains one 15-page invoice (8500026528). Clear one-to-one pairing.
All three criteria met: (1) invoice number 8500026528 matches, (2) consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer, (3) consignee Proxima LLC matches Bill to/Sold to.
SKF Eurotrade AB / Sweden matches exactly.
Proxima LLC / Azerbaijan matches exactly in Bill to and Sold to.
Certificate references invoice 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025. Both match. Description consistent with invoice contents.
GW 2087.860 KG and NW 1858.748 KG both match exactly between certificate and invoice.
All 13 countries in certificate found in invoice. No extra non-listed countries in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren SKF Eurotrade AB i Sverige, mottagaren Proxima LLC i Azerbajdzjan, varubeskrivningen med fakturahänvisning, vikterna (brutto 2 087,860 kg och netto 1 858,748 kg) samt samtliga 13 ursprungsländer kan verifieras exakt mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate references invoice 8500026528 dated 18.12.2025 which matches the accompanying invoice exactly. Company names, addresses, countries, weights, package numbers, and all 13 countries of origin are fully consistent between certificate and invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.rule_applied: Direct name and country match between certificate consignor and invoice issuer
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SKF Eurotrade AB' i certifikatet är identiskt med fakturans utställare. Landet 'Sweden' överensstämmer. GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg är en tillåten normalisering av diakritiska tecken.

Fakturanumret och datumet överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll (diverse lager, kedjor, smörjare, tätningar, hus, induktionsvärmare etc.) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning. Dessutom överensstämmer transportkollinummer och antal kolli (16 CASE(S)).

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.97. comparison_result=IDENTICAL, workflow_recommendation=AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. Consistency verified: no MISMATCH checkpoints, no sub-0.85 confidence on any MATCH checkpoint.
